title: phegopteris meniscioides
intro: Phegopteris meniscioides, also known as the Meniscus fern or Meniscus-leafed fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phegopteris meniscioides include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Phegopteris meniscioides include infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves in hot water.
